title: Position
description: A Position object returned by the Apache Cordova Geolocation plugin containing coordinates and timestamp.

altitude.description: Height of the position in meters above the ellipsoid.

accuracy.description: Accuracy level of the latitude and longitude coordinates in meters.

altitudeAccuracy.description: Accuracy level of the altitude coordinate in meters. null if not available.

heading.description: Direction of travel, specified in degrees counting clockwise relative to true north. null if not available.

speed.description: Current ground speed of the device, specified in meters per second. null if not available.

timestamp.description: Creation time for coords as a DOMTimeStamp (milliseconds since UNIX epoch).
